bench_setup.notes: ADC loopback: PC0 (GPIO output) drives high/low, PC1 (ADC1_IN11, analog) reads back via wire. 5 cycles required for PASS. Thresholds: high > 3000 counts, low < 500 counts (12-bit, 3.3V). detail0 = pass_count. Wire required: PC0 → PC1. NOTE: PC0 is also connected to LA P0.0 in bench wiring — LA is high-impedance and does not affect the test.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull. Drives 3.3V or 0V. Wire: PC0 → PC1.
ADC1_IN11, analog mode, no pull. Wire: PC0 → PC1.
